reason: Ready for review: env-var indirection implemented, tested, docs updated

review.reference: Review passed: env-var/tilde expansion correctly scoped to effective_root() (T001), stored local_path field never mutated (_coerce_local_path no-op verified), round-trip preserved and tested (test_round_trip_preserves_env_var_template), unset-var fails closed via new OrgPackEnvVarUnsetError (naming var+pack, not swallowed by pack_context.py's broad except), subdir validator/symlink-escape check untouched, legacy organisation_packs shape verified to funnel through the same OrgPackConfig constructor (T004). 79/79 targeted tests pass, ruff clean, mypy --strict clean. Docs updated for SPEC_KITTY_PACK_HOME.

reason: Review passed: env-var/tilde expansion correctly scoped to effective_root() (T001), stored local_path field never mutated (_coerce_local_path no-op verified), round-trip preserved and tested (test_round_trip_preserves_env_var_template), unset-var fails closed via new OrgPackEnvVarUnsetError (naming var+pack, not swallowed by pack_context.py's broad except), subdir validator/symlink-escape check untouched, legacy organisation_packs shape verified to funnel through the same OrgPackConfig constructor (T004). 79/79 targeted tests pass, ruff clean, mypy --strict clean. Docs updated for SPEC_KITTY_PACK_HOME.

Ready for review: persisted structured languages field on references.yaml at compile time (compiler.py); infer_repo_languages now reads it as canonical, falling back to interview/charter.md only when absent (language_scope.py). Red-first confirmed: pinning test passed (green) against unfixed code, proving the interview-preferred bug; inverted to assert charter-authoritative precedence, added disagreement + structured-field + backward-compat tests. Verified context.py/compact.py have zero duplicated precedence logic; added end-to-end test through _build_doctrine_service and a real compile-write-read round-trip test. ruff+mypy zero issues on changed files.

review.reference: Review passed: T008-T014 verified. Structured languages field persists to references.yaml at compile time (compiler.py) and round-trips through a real disk write/read (test_compiler.py). infer_repo_languages correctly treats compiled field as unconditionally authoritative once present, falling back to interview→charter.md only when absent (language_scope.py). Red-first discipline confirmed for T011: pinning test proven green-on-bug, inverted to charter-authoritative assertion, plus disagreement and structured-field-only cases added. T012 backward-compat test covers pre-existing references.yaml without the field. T010 verified context.py/compact.py have zero duplicated precedence logic (both call infer_repo_languages directly) and added a real end-to-end test through _build_doctrine_service. ruff+mypy clean on all 4 touched files; tests/charter/test_language_scope.py (7/7), test_compiler.py, and the new test_context.py case all pass in isolation. Unrelated failures in test_context.py::TestBuildContextV2 and other canonical-root/worktree-resolution suites are pre-existing environment issues (NotInsideRepositoryError for pytest tmp dirs), not caused by this diff. Minor nit (non-blocking): CompiledCharter gained an unused 'languages' field alongside 'active_languages' - dead code, worth a follow-up cleanup but doesn't affect correctness.
